title: Vanilla Revamped
description: A modpack focused in performance and QoL features.
body:
# Vanilla Revamped

The **Vanilla Revamped** modpack was created to improve vanilla experience with some QoL mods and a lot of performance impovements. Thanks to some hours of testing, I think we created a modpack that can compete with OptiFine at performance levels.

We built this modpack for full compatibility on decent computers, so it won't do miracles. We recommend between 4 to 8 gigabytes of RAM, and the latest LTS Java Version.
We aim to be simple, so you can add extra mods that you want later.

_We cannot ensure full compatibility with all mods, but you can contact me on Discord if you encounter any errors or crashes. (@korahx)_

## Main Features
- Improved performance
- Shader support
    - Dynamic Lights
    - Custom animations
- Renewed construction system
- Minimap
- Freecam
- FullBright
- Zoom
